evals.prompt: A controller session loses chat context while two child lanes, one critic, and a human gate are active.
evals.expected_output: Reconstructs state from durable artifacts and session ledger, pauses at the human gate, and avoids double-dispatching workers.
assertions: Durable artifacts are used instead of chat memory.
No duplicate worker session is launched.

evals.prompt: Human review rejects a deployed preview and says the product direction changed.
evals.expected_output: Records the feedback event, routes to fix or replan based on scope, and does not continue to the next protected wave until dispositioned.
assertions: Human feedback is linked to the wave and review evidence.
Protected product change routes to replan or project definition.
Controller state and handoff are updated.
